steps.title: Substitute h = 539.33 and isolate the variable term
steps.content:
Substitute $h = 539.33$ into the conversion equation:
$$539.33 = \frac{9(v-273.15)}{5} + 32$$

Subtract 32 from both sides:
$$507.33 = \frac{9(v-273.15)}{5}$$

Multiply both sides by 5 to clear the fraction:
$$2536.65 = 9(v-273.15)$$

Divide both sides by 9:
$$281.85 = v - 273.15$$

steps.title: Add 273.15 to solve for the temperature in kelvins
steps.content:
Add 273.15 to both sides:
$$v = 281.85 + 273.15 = 555$$

The corresponding temperature is 555 kelvins.
